activated_rules.rule_name: Consignor identification via full document text search (group structure check)
For consignor, acceptance of abbreviation of legal company form
Consignee priority order: invoice to / bill to / sold to first
Goods description verification prioritizes article number
Quantity verification by direct presence in invoice
Allowed removal of thousand separators in numeric quantities
Total weight in invoice accepted for verification
Origin normalization and verification including EU equivalences

consignor.motivation: The consignor 'Bulten Sweden AB' from the certificate is explicitly identified in the invoice header and payment information blocks with exact name and matching country (Sweden). Allowed abbreviation of legal form considered (AB). No contradictions found.

consignee.certificate_value: Volvo Cars Chengdu Zhongjia Automob Manufact. Ltd(764)
consignee.invoice_value: VOLVO CARS CHENGDU Zhongjia Auto Manuf. Ltd (764-2CKR)
consignee.motivation: The consignee name from the certificate matches the invoice 'Payer' field and delivery address as 'VOLVO CARS CHENGDU Zhongjia Automobile Manufacture Ltd'. Minor abbreviation and slight variations are within accepted normalization including legal form. Country (China) matches exactly.

goods_description.motivation: An exact match of the goods description is found between certificate and invoice with the same text 'Screws, other self-tapping (TT, PT, RF)'. Article number '73181499' also matches in both documents supporting verification.

quantity.motivation: Quantity '3900 pcs' in certificate is explicitly stated and identically found in invoice. KG weights for net and gross (53 and 71) respectively match exactly in both documents. Thousand separators are consistent and allowed normalization applied.

origin.motivation: The certificate states origin as 'Sweden' and the invoice contains the ISO country code 'SE' which is the accepted equivalent. EU normalization rules confirmed active; Sweden is an EU member state consistent with certificate.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points are matched without discrepancy or ambiguity. Consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin align fully under the allowed normalizations and rules.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Consignor, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland kan verifieras klart och tydligt, vilket möjliggör automatisk godkännande.
